# Awesome AI Agent Tools

> The most comprehensive open-source library for AI agent skills, MCP servers, and agent workflows. 69 production-ready skill files, 66 verified MCP server configurations, 73 repeatable agent workflows. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and every major AI coding assistant.

## What This Repo Contains

- **69 AI Agent Skills**: Reusable SKILL.md files for development, design, content, DevOps, security, and data workflows
- **66 MCP Server Configurations**: Verified Model Context Protocol servers with install commands and security notes
- **73 Agent Workflows (Loops)**: Repeatable patterns with exact prompts, verification criteria, and source attribution
- **Cross-Platform Support**: Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Aider, and Windsurf
- **Catalogs with Metadata**: JSON catalogs for programmatic discovery and tooling integration
- **Contributing Infrastructure**: Templates, issue templates, CI validation, and review checklists
- **Community Resources**: Links to 10+ notable skill collections, MCP registries, and agent frameworks

## Key Files

- [README](README.md) - Project overview, quick start, and full catalog
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to add skills, MCPs, or loops
- [Skills Library](skills/) - 69 installable skill files with catalog
- [MCP Servers](mcps/) - 66 verified MCP server configs with catalog
- [Agent Loops](loops/) - 73 workflow patterns with catalog
- [Documentation](docs/) - Getting started, feature reference, tool comparisons
- [Prompt Engineering](prompting/) - Prompt techniques and strategies
- [Rules & Best Practices](rules/) - Security, ethics, quality guidelines
- [Workflows](workflows/) - Advanced autonomous workflows
- [Research](research/) - Architecture analysis, ecosystem research
